_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Department OF Defense (Dod) Manufacturing Process Documents
summary: This DID specifies military unique design and functional criteria for DoD Manufacturing Process Standards used in system development, including format and content preparation instructions.
use_relationship: A DoD Manufacturing Process Standard will be used to specify military unique design or functional criteria that must be adhered to in the development of systems, subsystems, equipment, assemblies, components, items, or parts. This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format and content preparation instructions for DoD Manufacturing Process Standards and their associated documents that are described in the following paragraphs of MIL-STD-962. Only those documents listed below will be required when specified individually on contract. a. DoD Manufacturing Process Standard – Paragraphs 4.1 through 5.15. b. DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Revision – Paragraph 5.17. c. DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Change – Paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7. d. DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Inactive for New Design Notice – Paragraph 5.19.2. e. DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Cancellation Notice – Paragraph 5.19.3. f. DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Reinstatement Notice – Paragraph 5.19.4. g. DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Reactivation Notice – 5.19.5. h. DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Administrative Notice – Paragraph 5.19.6.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference Documents:
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable notices and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format and Content:
preparation_instructions.content: Format and content for DoD Manufacturing Process Standards shall be as follows:

children.title: DoD Manufacturing Process Standard.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Manufacturing Process Standards shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraphs 4.1 through 5.15.

children.title: DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Revision:
children.content: Format and content of DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Revisions shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.17.

children.title: DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Changes.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Changes shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7.

children.title: DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Inactive for New Design Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Inactive for New Design Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.2.

children.title: DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Cancellation Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Cancellation Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.3.

children.title: DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Reinstatement Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Reinstatement Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.4.

children.title: DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Reactivation Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Reactivation Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.5.

children.title: DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Administrative Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Manufacturing Process Standard Administrative Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.6.
